title: LiDAR Point Cloud
subtitle: Visualize and analyze 3D point clouds with CesiumJS. Download PNOA data or upload your own drone flights.
feature.download.title: PNOA Download
feature.download.desc: Access LiDAR data from the National Aerial Orthophotography Plan for any parcel in Spain.
feature.upload.title: Custom Upload
feature.upload.desc: Upload .LAZ files from your own drone flights. Compatible with any georeferenced LiDAR sensor.
feature.trees.title: Tree Detection
feature.trees.desc: Advanced segmentation algorithms to identify individual trees, height and crown area.
pipeline.title: Processing Pipeline
pipeline.step1.title: Ingest
pipeline.step2.title: Spectral Fusion
pipeline.step3.title: Segmentation
pipeline.step4.title: 3D Tiling
howTo.title: How to Use
howTo.step1.title: Select a Parcel
howTo.step1.desc: In the unified viewer, click any parcel (AgriParcel) to activate the LiDAR module.
howTo.step2.title: Choose Data Source
howTo.step2.desc: Download automatically from PNOA or upload your own .LAZ file from a drone flight.
howTo.step3.title: Visualize in 3D
howTo.step3.desc: The point cloud loads in CesiumJS with dynamic colorization (height, NDVI, classification).
footer: This module integrates with the unified viewer via slots. Navigate to the map and select a parcel to begin.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this layer? This action cannot be undone.
config.title: LiDAR Configuration
config.clickTree: Click a tree on the map to see details
tree.title: Individual Tree
tree.health.label: Status
